isEnabled.description: Specifies whether the admin consent request feature is enabled or disabled. Required.

notifyReviewers.description: Specifies whether reviewers will receive notifications. Required.

remindersEnabled.description: Specifies whether reviewers will receive reminder emails. Required.

requestDurationInDays.description: Specifies the duration the request is active before it automatically expires if no decision is applied.

reviewers.description: The list of reviewers for the admin consent. Required.

version.description: Specifies the version of this policy. When the policy is updated, this version is updated. Read-only.
